Functions for managing notification preferences and mute settings for apps in ANCS.

# Purpose
This C header file provides function declarations for managing notification preferences for applications using the Apple Notification Center Service (ANCS). It includes functions to update notification preferences for a specific app, check if an app is muted for the current day, and retrieve the mute type of an app. The function [`ancs_filtering_record_app`](<#ancs_filtering_record_app>) updates the notification preferences database with details such as the app ID, display name, and notification title. The function [`ancs_filtering_is_muted`](<#ancs_filtering_is_muted>) checks if notifications for a given app are muted, while [`ancs_filtering_get_mute_type`](<#ancs_filtering_get_mute_type>) returns the type of mute applied to the app. The file includes necessary headers for ANCS types and notification preference database operations.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `comm/ble/kernel_le_client/ancs/ancs_types.h`
- `services/normal/blob_db/ios_notif_pref_db.h`
